knowledgeGraph.title: Knowledge Graph
knowledgeGraph.description: Explore connections between images and entities. Zoom and pan the graph with your mouse. Grab and pull a node to re-arrange the graph. Click a node to see more information.

graphType.title: Graph Type
graphType.description: Select how you want to visualize your data.
graphType.hierarchyDescription: Visualize the data model hierarchy, folder structure and entity annotations.
graphType.relationsDescription: Visualize the Relationships between annotations. Data model hierarchy and entity annotations are shown on hover.

settingsPanel.hideLabelsDescription: Don't show text labels for graph nodes. A hover tooltip will be used instead.
settingsPanel.showSubFoldersDescription: Include sub-folders inside your workfolder as nodes in the graph.
settingsPanel.hideUnconnectedNodesDescription: Remove nodes without any connections from the graph.

relationship.title: Relationship
relationship.description: Connections based on Relationships between your annotations.

entityClassHierarchy.title: Entity class hierarchy
entityClassHierarchy.description: Links between parent- and child Entity Classes in your data model.

folderStructure.title: Folder structure
folderStructure.description: File structure of sub-folders and image files in your project directory.

entityAnnotations.title: Entity Annotations
entityAnnotations.description: Connections between images and Entity Classes, based on the tags in your annotations.

linkLabels.relationshipsBetweenEntities_one: {{count}} Relationship between entities of this class ({{relations}})
linkLabels.relationshipsBetweenEntities_other: {{count}} Relationships between entities of this class ({{relations}})

export.exporting: Exporting XLSX. This may take a while.
